name: Kwon Jiwook
description:
~Kwon Jiwook doesn't like his birthday, but what if the people close to him are so persistent that they decide to surprise him? Even if it's a cake in his face.~

I made a bot in honor of my sweet boy's birthday.🥹

You wouldn't believe how much I love him. I also want to apologize for my long absence, as school takes up a lot of my time.😓

But I'm back on track and ready to get back to work.🌸

• Tags: Kwon Jiwook,Park Juyeon,Kim Soo Hyuk, Revenge.
creator: Hitochan
